overall.description: A truck drives through heavy snowfall at night in a driving simulator, navigating snow-covered roads through rural forests and a small village. The first-person cabin view shows active windshield wipers and dashboard instrumentation as the vehicle passes street lights and occasional traffic.

agents.ego_description: driving cautiously on snow-covered rural road with headlights illuminating the path through heavy falling snow

entered.detail: two-lane road completely covered in snow with visible lane markings
dense forest of snow-covered trees lining the left side of the road
dense forest of snow-covered trees lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The truck travels along a snow-covered rural road surrounded by dense forest on both sides. Heavy snow falls continuously, reducing visibility as the headlights cut through the darkness. The windshield wipers move steadily to clear the accumulating snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street with residential buildings and street lighting

events.description: entering built-up village area with street lights and residential buildings becoming visible
passing a dark-colored car parked or moving slowly on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating through the village street at reduced speed, passing other vehicles and buildings

notable_agents.action: car moving slowly or parked on the left side of the snowy village street

entered.detail: traditional European-style houses with snow-covered roofs and illuminated windows
tall street lamps casting warm orange light on the snow
wooden fence running along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a small village where street lights illuminate the snowy road. Residential buildings line the right side while a wooden fence runs along the left. The truck passes another vehicle as it drives through the built-up area, with the lighting changing from pure headlights to a mix of artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy rural road with road signs and markings

events.description: exiting village back into rural forested area with street lights ending
approaching zebra crossing and road signs indicating potential intersection or entry to another zone

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey through heavy snowfall on rural roads, navigating past road signs and markings

entered.detail: dense snow-covered forest returning on the left side of the road
dense snow-covered forest returning on the right side of the road
blue and white traffic signs indicating directions or warnings
pedestrian crosswalk markings painted on the snow-covered road surface

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the truck returns to the dark rural forest road. The lighting reverts to headlights only as street lights disappear. The vehicle continues through persistent heavy snow, passing road signs and a zebra crossing marking, with dense forest lining both sides of the road for the remainder of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a truck moves from a secluded, snowy forest into the artificial glow of a small village. It begins on a rural road where heavy snowfall and dense trees limit visibility, with headlights cutting through the darkness and windshield wipers working steadily. As the vehicle progresses, the oppressive darkness of the woods gives way to the warm illumination of street lights. The scene then shifts into a built-up area, passing residential buildings and a wooden fence while encountering another vehicle on the road. The lighting finally transforms from the narrow beam of the headlights into a mix of ambient artificial light as the truck navigates through the village.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the truck departs a lit village and descends back into the oppressive darkness of a rural forest. It begins by leaving the last of the village behind, where the warm glow of street lights gradually fades away. As the vehicle moves forward, the lighting shifts exclusively to the reach of the headlights, cutting through persistent heavy snow. The scene then transitions past road signs and a zebra crossing marking before the environment closes in, with dense forests lining both sides of the road for the remainder of the journey.
